normal.name: Labyrinth (Normal)
normal.note: Do this ASAP after Malachai — gives your first 2 Ascendancy points

cruel.name: Labyrinth (Cruel)
cruel.note: Available after Act 6 — gives 2 more Ascendancy points

merciless.name: Labyrinth (Merciless)
merciless.note: Available after Act 8 — gives 2 more Ascendancy points

eternal.name: Eternal Labyrinth
eternal.note: Endgame lab — final 2 Ascendancy points. Requires Izaro trials in maps

actions: Talk to Tarkleigh — pick Fireball or Freezing Pulse or Spark
Talk to Nessa — pick Arcane Surge Support
Grab Flame Dash or Dash for movement
Lioneye's Watch.tips: Don't over-loot here. Grab gems and go — you'll come back after Mud Flats.

actions: Run straight toward The Mud Flats — do not full clear
Grab any flasks on the ground
The Coast.tips: Coast WP isn't needed. The Mud Flats WP connects back.

actions: Collect all 3 Glyphs (glowing cyan items on the ground)
[Optional] Find the Fetid Pool entrance — good loot chest inside
The Mud Flats.tips: Glyphs spawn randomly across the zone. Look for glowing cyan ground items.

actions: [Optional] Find The Flooded Depths side area — kill Kadavrus the Defiler inside
The Submerged Passage.tips: Kadavrus drops decent gear for this stage. Small area so easy to clear.

actions: Run straight east — long corridor zone
[Optional] Kill Kuduku the False God if you spot him
Enter The Climb at the far end
The Ledge.tips: Fastest zone in Act 1. Don't slow down.

rewards.reward: Added Fire Damage Support or Added Cold Damage Support or Added Lightning Damage Support

The Lower Prison.tips: Brutus slams hard. Keep moving and don't stand in front of him.

actions: Find Piety's Chest — contains a key Skill Gem for your build
The Upper Prison.tips: Piety's Chest is in a room near the top of the zone. Don't skip it.

actions: Kill Captain Fairgraves inside the cave
Return to Lioneye's Watch — claim Passive Point from Nessa
The Ship Graveyard.tips: Fairgraves is undead — fire and physical damage work well. Grab his Wicked Ward amulet.

actions: Navigate through to The Cavern of Anger
Kill Merveil, the Twisted (Act 1 final boss)
Enter Act 2 through the far door
The Cavern of Anger.tips: Merveil uses cold and chaos damage. Prioritize cold resistance. Keep moving — her tentacle slam hits hard.

actions: Find The Forest Encampment (town) — it's in this zone
Activate the WP inside the encampment
Talk to Greust to unlock vendor
Talk to Silk — he gives a gem reward
Talk to Yeena — she sells gems
Head to The Old Fields via The Southern Forest
[Optional] Find the Den — kill Weaver inside (good passive point quest)
Activate the Waypoint — this is the central hub of Act 2
Head west to The Broken Bridge to find Kraityn (bandit)
Head north to The Fellshrine Ruins
Head east to The Chamber of Sins
The Crossroads.tips: BANDIT CHOICE coming up — decide before entering bandit camps: Kill All = 2 Passive Points (recommended for most builds). Help Alira = mana regen + crit multi (caster builds). Check your build guide!

actions: Find Kraityn — kill him OR help him (see bandit tips)
The Broken Bridge.tips: Kraityn gives: Attack Speed + Avoid Elemental Ailments if helped. Kill him for 1/3 of the 2 passive points.

actions: [Optional] Head through to The Crypt (find it in this zone)
[Optional] Clear The Crypt Level 1 and 2 for good exp
Find and kill Fidelitas, the Mourning (boss) — quest kill
Head to Chamber of Sins Level 2

rewards.reward: Skill Gem choice for killing Fidelitas

actions: Find Piety — she drops a gem and has lore dialogue
Grab the Baleful Gem from her room
Return to Crossroads — head to The Riverways
Head west to The Western Forest (find Alira bandit)
Head east to The Eastern Forest (find Oak bandit)
Then head north to The Wetlands
Find Alira — kill her OR help her (bandit choice)
Kill The Weaver inside — get the Maligaro's Spike

rewards.reward: Passive Points based on bandit choice

The Western Forest.tips: Alira gives: Mana Regen + All Resistances + Crit Multi if helped. Most builds kill her for passive points.

actions: Find Oak — kill him OR help him (bandit choice)
Find the Vaal Ruins — enter them
Activate the WP in the Vaal Ruins
The Eastern Forest.tips: Oak gives: Life Regeneration + Physical Damage Reduction + Physical Damage if helped. Kill him for passive points.

actions: Find the entrance to The Vaal Ruins
Navigate through to The Northern Forest
Kill Vaal Oversoul (Act 2 final boss) — 3 phases
The Ancient Pyramid.tips: Vaal Oversoul has physical slam and lightning beam. Stay out of the beam. Kill the summoned minions to stop the spam.

actions: Talk to Clarissa — unlocks The Sewer quest
Talk to Grigor — he mentions the Labyrinth trials
Head to The City of Sarn

ascendancy.note: Normal Lab trials are found in Acts 1-3. Complete all 6 trials before entering the lab after this act!

actions: [Optional] Find The Catacombs entrance (side area — good exp)
Find and kill General Gravicius (quest boss)
Find Tolman — rescue him (or his body)
Find the 3 Platinum Busts (quest items — they glow)
Find the Undying Evangelist and kill it
The Sewers.tips: The Platinum Busts can be anywhere in the sewers. Check every room.

actions: Find and kill Bannon (Imperial Guard Captain)
Find the Labyrinth Trial (Endurance Charge on Melee Stun) — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: One of the 6 Normal Lab trials is here! Don't skip it — you need all 6 for your Ascendancy.

The Imperial Gardens.tips: The trial room is somewhere in the gardens. Check every path.

actions: Return to Sarn Encampment — use seals at the Lunaris/Solaris temples
Return to Sarn Encampment — report to Grigor
Navigate to The Belly of the Beast
The Threshold.next: The Belly of the Beast Level 1

The Belly of the Beast Level 1.next: The Belly of the Beast Level 2

actions: Kill Malachai, the Nightmare (Act 3 final boss) — multiple phases
After killing Malachai — DO THE NORMAL LABYRINTH NOW

ascendancy.note: You should have all 6 Normal Lab trials by now. Do the Normal Labyrinth BEFORE continuing to Act 4 — get your first 2 Ascendancy points!

The Harvest.tips: Malachai has 4 phases. Watch for the beam attack — move sideways. Use a life flask and don't panic.

actions: Talk to Oyun — unlocks gem vendor
Talk to Dialla — starts the Inpulsa quest
Head to The Dried Lake for quick exp
[Optional] Full clear this zone — great exp density
Find and kill Voll, Emperor of Purity
The Dried Lake.tips: The Dried Lake is the best exp zone in Act 4. Take your time here if you're underleveled.

actions: Find the Forgotten Gulch (side area — Labyrinth Trial inside)

ascendancy.note: The Forgotten Gulch side area in The Mines contains a Normal Lab trial. Find it!

actions: Head to Daresso's Dream and The Kaom's Dream (two separate areas)
Kill Daresso and Kaom — get their Dream Fragments
Return to Crystal Veins — head to Kaom's Path
The Crystal Veins.tips: Daresso is a dodge-heavy boss. Kaom is a tanky melee boss. Do both for passive points.

actions: Kill Kaom, Heart of Oakness (final area)

rewards.reward: 2 Passive Points for killing Kaom + Daresso

Kaom's Dream.tips: Kaom hits extremely hard. Stack life and resists before attempting.

actions: Return to Crystal Veins — head to The Belly of the Beast
Daresso's Dream.tips: Daresso summons spectral copies. Focus the real one (it takes damage).
Daresso's Dream.next: The Belly of the Beast Level 1

actions: Kill Dominus, Eternal Overseer — then kill his second phase Dominus, Ascendant
The Black Core.tips: Dominus rains holy fire. Stand in the safe spots (white circles). His second phase adds a chaos beam — dodge it.

actions: Talk to Sin — starts the main Act 5 quests
Find the Labyrinth Trial (Conditional trial) inside

ascendancy.note: Cruel Lab trial found here — you'll need this for your second Ascendancy after Act 6!

actions: Talk to Innocence — important story beat
Kill Innocence, God of Order (Act 5 final boss)
The Chamber of Innocence.tips: Innocence has a massive holy beam — dodge sideways. He also summons totems that buff him. Kill the totems first.

actions: Talk to Nessa — gem vendor again
IMPORTANT: Resistances are now -30% — check your gear now!

ascendancy.note: After clearing Act 6, do the Cruel Labyrinth for your next 2 Ascendancy points!

Lioneye's Watch (Act 6).tips: MAJOR WARNING: From Act 6 onwards your resistances drop by 30%. Make sure all your resistances are capped (75%) before proceeding or you will die constantly.

actions: Find Tidal Island — kill Tarkleigh's shade inside
Find and kill the Brinerot Whalers (quest)
Find the Labyrinth Trial (Cruel) inside — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: Cruel Lab trial here! One of the trials you need for Cruel Lab Ascendancy.

actions: Kill Shavronne of Umbra and Brutus, Lord Incarcerus (dual boss)
The Warden's Chambers.tips: Both bosses are active at the same time. Shavronne uses lightning — dodge her balls. Brutus slams — stay mobile.

actions: Head to The Western Forest (Act 6) — find Ryslatha
Head to The Eastern Forest (Act 6) — find Shakari
Find the Labyrinth Trial (Cruel) — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: Another Cruel Lab trial here. Get it before moving on!

actions: Kill Shakari, Queen of the Sands
[Optional] Find and kill Ryslatha's Hatchery (good exp)
Kill The Brine King, God of the Sea (Act 6 final boss)
After Act 6 — DO THE CRUEL LABYRINTH NOW for 2 more Ascendancy points

ascendancy.note: Act 6 is done! If you have all Cruel Lab trials, now is the time to do the Cruel Labyrinth and claim your next 2 Ascendancy points!

The Beacon.tips: Brine King creates a whirlpool arena. Avoid the water walls spinning around him. He also has a cold phase — cold res is key.

actions: Talk to Helena — main quest giver
Find the Trial of Ascendancy (Merciless Lab trial) — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: Merciless Lab trial found here. You'll need all Merciless trials for your next Ascendancy after Act 8.

actions: Head to The Chamber of Sins (Act 7) — both levels
Find the Maligaro's Sanctum — kill Maligaro, Doyen of Madness
Find the Trial of Ascendancy (Merciless) — COMPLETE IT
Navigate through to The Ashen Fields

ascendancy.note: Merciless Lab trial here in Chamber of Sins Level 2!

actions: Find and kill Gruthkul, Mother of Despair
Find the Trial of Ascendancy (Merciless) — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: Another Merciless trial here in the Northern Forest!

actions: Find and enter the Temple of Decay
Kill Arakaali, Spinner of Shadows (Act 7 final boss)
The Temple of Decay Level 2.tips: Arakaali deals chaos and physical damage. Have chaos resistance if possible. She summons spider adds — clear them or they overwhelm you.

actions: Talk to Clarissa — main quest giver
Find the Trial of Ascendancy (Merciless) — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: Merciless Lab trial in The Grain Gate! You need all of these for Merciless Lab after Act 8.

actions: Find the Undying Block and The Solaris Concourse
Find the Trial of Ascendancy (Merciless) — COMPLETE IT

ascendancy.note: Last Merciless trial is here in Solaris Temple! After Act 8 you can do Merciless Lab.

actions: Kill Yugul, Reflection of Terror (Lunaris boss)
Return to Clarissa — report both temples cleared
Head to The Vastiri Desert (or Doedre's Cesspool depending on quest)
Navigate through to The Ebony Barracks (Act 8)
Head to The Lunaris Concourse — find The High Gardens
Head to The Quay (or The Toxic Conduit for Malachai)
Kill Malachai's Head, Eyes, Guts, and Heart (four separate fights)
Kill the final form of Malachai
After Act 8 — DO THE MERCILESS LABYRINTH for 2 more Ascendancy points

ascendancy.note: Act 8 done! Do the Merciless Labyrinth now if you have all 6 trials — 2 more Ascendancy points await!

The Toxic Conduit.tips: The four Malachai fights each have different mechanics. The Heart fight is the hardest — bring life flasks.

actions: Talk to Petarus and Vanja — gem vendors
Find the Oasis — kill Shakari's Avatar
Find the Quarry — kill the Gargoyle
Kill the Phoenix Guardian (if available as quest)
Head to The Belly of the Beast (Act 9)
Kill the Depraved Trinity (three bosses — Puruna, Adalura, Kroepis)
The Rotting Core.tips: The Trinity fight has three bosses that buff each other. Focus one at a time — kill the one with the least HP first.

actions: IMPORTANT: Second resistance penalty applies here (-60% total from base now)
Oriath (Act 10).tips: MAJOR WARNING: Another -30% resistance penalty in Act 10. Total is now -60% from your base. Make sure you are fully capped on resistances before this act or you will die instantly to elemental damage.

actions: Talk to Lani here for a quest
Find the Forgotten Reliquary — good currency and uniques inside
Kill Kitava, Destroyer (Act 10 final boss — two phases)
GAME COMPLETE — you are now in the Epilogue!
Do the ETERNAL LABYRINTH as soon as possible for your final 2 Ascendancy points

ascendancy.note: After Kitava — start doing the Eternal Labyrinth! Its trials are in endgame maps. Complete 6 Eternal trials then run the Eternal Lab for your final 2 Ascendancy points and your Pantheon upgrade.

rewards.reward: Epilogue content unlocked — maps, Atlas, endgame

The Reliquary.tips: Kitava phase 1: avoid his slam and fire breath. Phase 2: he gains a massive AOE fire explosion — keep moving at all times. Have max fire resistance. After this fight your resists drop a final -30% — recheck your gear immediately in the Epilogue town!
